conservative.name: The Waking Wood
conservative.requirements: 6 favour, targets trees and bushes within long range

success.description: You invoke the blessing and may immediately perform a free Guarded Position action

boon.description: Each enemy engaged with the affected trees suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue as the boughs flail at them

challenge.description: Special: If you have Nature Lore trained, reduce the difficulty modifier by

reckless.name: The Waking Wood
reckless.requirements: 6 favour, targets trees and bushes within long range

success.description: You invoke the blessing and may immediately perform a free Melee Strike action

boon.description: Each enemy engaged with the affected trees suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue as the boughs flail at them

bane.description: Each ally engaged with the affected trees suffers 1 stress

challenge.description: Special: If you have Nature Lore trained reduce the difficulty modifier by
